title: Mosaic (MOS) Provides April & May Sales Details, Tweaks Q2 View
text: Mosaic (MOS) provides upbeat sales volume data for its Potash and Phosphate segments for April and May 2023.

title: Why Mosaic's Price Targets May Be Understated
text: Shares of Mosaic NYSE: MOS have been on a steady downtrend since their peak price of $79.28 per share in April 2022. The decline had only accelerated with a more substantial fall lasting for the entire second quarter of 2023 when prices went from virtually $43 per share down to a low of $31.44 in May.
